Log:
  www/trac-batchmodify: set for deprecation

  Track since version 1.0. Set expiration date to 2015-04-08.

  References:
   * http://trac.edgewall.org/ticket/525
   * http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/BatchModifyPlugin
